texto: I have never taken sides, never leaped wholeheartedly into one scale or the other; nor do I realize disappointments, provided they are severe, until the occasion is long past. Yet I am ruled by my emotions, though I murder them at birth.
explicacao: Citação de Geoffrey Household sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I have never taken sides, never leaped wholeheartedly into one scale or the other; nor do I reali…” articula amor, disappointment, emotions em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como emotions.

frase_original: I have never taken sides, never leaped wholeheartedly into one scale or the other; nor do I realize disappointments, provided they are severe, until the occasion is long past. Yet I am ruled by my emotions, though I murder them at birth.

texto: I have noticed that what cats most appreciate in a human being is not the ability to produce food - which they take for granted - but his or her entertainment value. Asmodeus took to his toy enthusiastically. In another week he permitted me to stroke him, producing a raucous purr, but, in order to save his face, pretending to be asleep.
explicacao: Citação de Geoffrey Household sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I have noticed that what cats most appreciate in a human being is not the ability to produce food…” articula reflexao, cats, noticed em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.

texto: None of my mental activities for the past twenty-four hours might be called thinking. I had allowed my body to take charge. It knew far more about escaping and healing than I did.
